title: Dad's Dodge Dance
summary: Toss soft water balloons while Dad dances through a cheerful backyard splash zone.
description: A local-only backyard game where Dad joins the joke, dances across the splash zone, and cheers for gentle water-balloon tosses.

safety.privacy: Local-only play with no accounts, chat, sharing, or saved data.
safety.adultHelp: Adult preview is useful for framing the cartoon splash play as pretend backyard play with consent.
safety.notes: Dad is a smiling participant in the splash zone. There is no losing, timer pressure, public posting, or open-ended communication.
